About Us

Designed by Finnish Standards, Inspired by Tradition and Rooted in Science

How We Build

Every sauna begins with questions: How will you use it? Who will gather there? What does the space need to feel right?

We listen first, then design—creating saunas that fit naturally into their surroundings and serve their intended purpose.

Before production begins, we create detailed 3D renderings of your sauna so you can see exactly what your finished project will look like. This allows us to refine every detail together—from bench placement to window positioning—ensuring the final build matches your vision.

Materials & construction

We build with Western Red Cedar, locally sourced when possible. Cedar's natural resistance to moisture and decay makes it ideal for sauna construction, Its warmth and grain define the interior character. For enhanced durability, we offer Thermowood—heat-treated timber that's exceptionally stable and rot-resistant.

Exteriors can be customized to suit your style and setting, from traditional cedar siding to modern metal cladding. Our joinery is simple and strong. Hardware is stainless or galvanized. Insulation is proper. Stoves are reliable. Everything is built to last decades, not years.

Performance & durability

A good sauna heats evenly, retains warmth efficiently, and creates proper löyly—that soft steam that makes Finnish sauna what it is.

We design for performance first: airflow, heat retention, moisture management, and user comfort. Our insulation and construction means your sauna requires less fuel to heat and holds temperature longer. Our saunas work reliably in Canadian winters and through years of heavy use.

Working together

The process is transparent, timelines are realistic, and communication is consistent. We build things that last. That's worth getting right.

Our Story

Secret Sauna Co. was founded with the simple goal of enjoying an authentic Finnish riverside sauna. Having spent years exploring hidden local saunas, our aspiration was to recreate those exceptional, nature-immersed moments.

Without access to waterfront property, we envisioned a mobile sauna capable of creating those distinctive riverside experiences anywhere. Following careful study of traditional Finnish sauna design and diligent planning, we succeeded in crafting a sauna that surpassed our own expectations.

Today, our aim is to extend this unique experience to you.

Our Vision

At Secret Sauna Co. we want to provide everyone with the sensation of discovering their own secluded, secret sauna.

Genuine Finnish Experience

Strong löyly, proper heat, time-tested construction methods.

Minimal Environmental Impact

Materials selected for longevity, not disposability. Built to minimize waste.

Form Follows Function

Every design decision serves the sauna experience first.

Designed by Finnish Standards, Inspired by Tradition and Rooted in Science.
